intro_text: With a dual background in quantum physics, photonics, and intellectual property, I help companies transform complex technologies into strong, defensible IP assets.

career_timeline.highlights: Founded TechnoGenesis to provide device level patent intelligence for physics driven innovation. Focus on patent search, technical dossiers, and university collaborations.
Completed PEB FC3 certification in international patent law through CIPA (UK).
Managed IP for physics and mechanics projects; prepared weekly patent committee briefings and coordinated prosecution strategy with external counsel.
Awarded Qualified Patent Information Professional certification; formal recognition of advanced patent information skills.
Led a team of patent analysts supporting vehicle cockpit R&D. Responsibilities included patentability studies, FTO analyses, landscaping, and continuous monitoring of competitor filings.

Experimental research on micro lasers and optical resonators, with emission spanning deep UV to blue wavelengths. Work included device design, fabrication, and characterization; resulted in 21 peer reviewed publications.

Cardiff University, UK. Doctoral research on the characterization of quantum-confined lasers and optical amplifiers with emission from the red to the near infrared, focused on performance metrics for telecommunications.

opening_paragraph: Meletis Mexis, PhD, is the founder of TechnoGenesis. A physicist turned patent information professional, he combines ten years of scientific research in quantum optoelectronics with eight years of industrial intellectual property (IP) experience. Clients get direct access to a physicist who understands device physics, experimental constraints, and patent claim language — so technical evidence and IP strategy are aligned from the start.
short_intro: Strategic Intellectual Property for Advanced Technologies. Translating technical insight into defensible patents and commercial advantage.
